reference: Hello, Madam. Bleeding, especially with clots, is not a good sign. It is advisable to visit an otorhinolaryngologist for a detailed examination. They will guide you better. One of the reasons for bleeding through the nose is high blood pressure, so please visit a doctor and get your blood pressure examined. Do follow the treatment meticulously; things will improve.
text: Hello, madam. Bleeding, especially with cloths, is not a good sign. It is advisable to visit an otolaryngologist for a detailed examination. It will guide you better. One of the reasons for bleeding through the nose is high blood pressure. So please visit a doctor and get your blood pressure. And do follow the treatment meticulously. Things will improve.
